summary: Comprehensive testing of Nagarik Automated Patrol Routing AI feature. Backend: 17/18 tests passed (1 minor health endpoint 404). Frontend: All UI elements verified - Patrol AI Dashboard loads, controls work (shift selector, sliders), route generation returns 10 zones with composite scores, expandable zone cards show score breakdown. Feature is fully functional.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - health endpoint may not exist at this path, not a critical issue

critical_code_review_comments: Patrol routing engine correctly implements composite scoring with 5 AI modules (forecast, trend, activity, learning, temporal)
TSP nearest-neighbor heuristic properly orders zones for optimal patrol route
All three shifts (morning, afternoon, night) return correct data with shift-specific labels
Score breakdown includes both raw and weighted values for transparency
Priority classification correctly maps scores to critical/high/medium/low
Empty state handled gracefully when no hotspot zones exist
Zone cards are expandable with detailed score breakdown
Summary panel shows total distance, time, zones, and critical count
Scoring weights visualization bar displays all 5 components
RBAC correctly enforces operator-only access (guardian gets 403)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Patrol AI UI elements verified and functional

seed_data_creation: Used existing location_risk_zones (learned_hotspots) data - 18 zones analyzed, 10 selected for route
context_for_next_testing_agent: Patrol Routing AI feature complete. Backend has 3 endpoints: patrol/generate (composite scoring + TSP optimization), patrol/summary (lightweight summary), patrol/shifts (shift definitions + weights). Frontend PatrolAIDashboard at /operator/patrol-ai with controls for shift, max zones, dwell time, and expandable zone cards showing score breakdowns. Route generation takes 3-8 seconds due to multi-engine scoring. Uses existing location_risk_zones table for hotspot data.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/operator/patrol/shifts returns shift definitions with ids, labels, start/end hours
GET /api/operator/patrol/shifts returns scoring weights (forecast 0.30, trend 0.25, activity 0.20, learning 0.15, temporal 0.10)
GET /api/operator/patrol/summary returns total_patrol_zones, critical_zones, high_zones, current_shift, shift_label, analyzed_at
GET /api/operator/patrol/generate?shift=morning returns route with zones, summary, shift info, priority_breakdown, weights
Route structure includes zone_id, zone_name, stop_number, composite_score, patrol_priority, score_breakdown
Summary structure includes total_distance_km, total_estimated_minutes, total_zones, avg/max/min composite scores
Priority breakdown correctly counts zones by priority level
Weights returned in generate response match expected values
Authentication required for all patrol endpoints (401/403 without token)
Guardian role correctly gets 403 on operator-only patrol endpoints
frontend_ui_tests: Patrol AI navigation link visible in sidebar
Clicking Patrol AI nav navigates to /operator/patrol-ai
Generate Route button (data-testid='patrol-generate-btn') visible and clickable
10 zone cards found with data-testid='patrol-zone-N' pattern
Zone cards expandable showing score breakdown
Shift selector dropdown allows changing shifts

verified_features: GET /api/operator/patrol/shifts - returns 3 shifts with scoring weights
GET /api/operator/patrol/summary - returns lightweight summary with current shift detection
GET /api/operator/patrol/generate - returns optimized patrol route with composite scores and TSP ordering
Route response includes: route array, summary, shift info, priority_breakdown, weights
Zone objects include: stop_number, composite_score, score_breakdown, patrol_priority
Score breakdown shows: forecast, trend, activity, learning, temporal (raw + weighted)
Control panel with shift selector, max zones slider, dwell time slider
Scoring weights visualization bar shows all 5 components
Generate Route button triggers API call and displays results
Summary cards show: distance, time, zones, critical count
Zone cards are numbered and show priority badges (critical/high/medium/low)
Zone cards expand to show detailed score breakdown with colored bars
Sidebar navigation includes Patrol AI link with Navigation icon
